amendment.description: An amendment numbered 29 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to codify the newly established Office of Seafood within the U.S. Department of Agriculture.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Mace amendment (A019) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Mace amendment (A019) Agreed to by voice vote.
